overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, driving through Night City's neon-lit downtown streets at night. The player follows a blue compact car through multi-lane roads, intersections, and under elaborate overpass systems with dense cyberpunk architecture and vibrant neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered multi-lane highway beneath overpass system

events.description: motorcycle makes right turn following blue car onto new road
approaching large open intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle under concrete overpass system, following a blue compact car through moderate-speed traffic

notable_agents.action: blue compact car driving ahead, maintaining consistent distance from motorcycle

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass spanning across the road with support pillars
light blue compact sedan being followed as the lead vehicle
illuminated commercial advertisements and signage on building facades
tall modern buildings with illuminated windows rising in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete overpass system with limited sky visibility. The motorcycle follows a blue compact car along a multi-lane asphalt road. Neon billboards illuminate the right side while glass skyscrapers rise in the distance. The motorcycle makes a right turn around 3 seconds, continuing through the covered highway environment before approaching a large intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with striped pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: exits covered highway into open intersection with yellow crosswalk markings
red neon vertical structures become visible ahead, casting red ambient light

agents.ego_description: accelerating through large intersection and entering street lined with distinctive red neon vertical lighting

notable_agents.action: blue compact car continuing ahead through intersection and down new street

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings covering the intersection
tall towers with prominent red neon vertical lighting creating a distinct skyline

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle emerges from under the overpass into a wide-open intersection with prominent yellow crosswalk stripes. After crossing, the scene transitions to a street dominated by tall red neon vertical structures in the distance. Digital billboards appear on the right as the motorcycle accelerates, with the blue car maintaining its lead position further ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway plaza with complex multi-level overpass intersections

events.description: entering complex plaza area with multi-level overpass structures and ramps
navigating turn and exiting plaza onto main commercial thoroughfare with overhead billboards

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through open plaza beneath elevated highway ramps, then accelerating onto billboard-lined commercial street

notable_agents.action: blue compact car navigating turns through the plaza ahead

entered.detail: complex intersection of multiple elevated highway ramps, supports, and crossing structures
large suspended digital advertisement screens spanning across the road overhead

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle enters a complex plaza area characterized by multiple levels of highway overpasses and ramps creating an intricate concrete canopy. After navigating through this open area, the scene transitions to a main commercial thoroughfare featuring massive digital billboards suspended overhead. The blue car remains visible ahead throughout the maneuvering.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with prominent neon signage and storefronts

events.description: passing large red 'kabayan' neon sign overhead, entering new commercial district
making right turn at intersection onto new street

agents.ego_description: cruising through dense commercial district with prominent neon signage, maintaining speed while following blue car

notable_agents.action: blue compact car continuing straight through commercial district ahead

entered.detail: large prominent red neon sign with 'kabayan' text spanning across the street
green illuminated architectural details and accent lighting on building facades

segments.scene_description: Driving through a dense commercial district characterized by the prominent red 'kabayan' neon sign overhead. The street features green neon accents on the left and various storefronts. The motorcycle maintains steady speed behind the blue car until making a right turn at the intersection around 46 seconds, transitioning to a new street.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown street with mixed commercial signage and advertisements

events.description: turning onto new street with different building facades and orange 'CROWD' neon sign

agents.ego_description: continuing through city streets at high speed, passing various neon advertisements and commercial storefronts

entered.detail: orange neon sign with 'CROWD' text illuminated on building facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the motorcycle turning onto a new downtown street featuring an orange 'CROWD' neon sign on the left. The blue compact car is no longer visible, having been left behind at the turn. The motorcycle continues through the neon-lit urban environment with various street-level advertisements and commercial buildings lining the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person ride through a neon-drenched metropolis, transitioning from the oppressive shadows of concrete overpasses into the vibrant, open commercial heart of the city. It begins beneath a massive highway system, following a blue compact car past towering glass skyscrapers before making a right turn toward a wide intersection marked by bold yellow crosswalks. As the motorcycle emerges from the overpass, the environment opens up into a plaza of intricate concrete ramps and suspended digital billboards, with the blue car remaining a constant lead. The scene then shifts into a dense commercial district dominated by a red kabayan neon sign and green accents, maintaining a steady pace until a final right turn at an intersection. This turn leaves the blue car behind, finally leading the camera down a new downtown street lined with orange neon signage and glowing street-level advertisements.
